glosses.yue: 令人恐慌; 令人慌張
glosses.ru: приводить в панику; сводить с ума
glosses.vi: làm hoảng sợ; làm hoang mang
glosses.uk: приводити до паніки; зводити з розуму
glosses.pl: wprawić w panikę; doprowadzić do szału
glosses.nb: sette i panikk; drive til vanvidd
glosses.ro: a băga în panică; a înnebuni
glosses.cs: uvést do paniky; přivést k šílenství
glosses.ja: パニックにさせる; 気を狂わせる

translations.en: That loud noise freaks them out.
translations.es: Ese ruido tan fuerte le pone de los nervios.
translations.de: Dieses laute Geräusch macht einen völlig fertig.
translations.it: Quel rumore forte lo manda nel panico.
translations.ko: 그 큰 소음이 그 사람을 겁먹게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那巨大的噪音把人吓坏了。
translations.yue: 嗰陣好嘈嘅聲令佢好驚。
translations.ru: Этот громкий шум приводит человека в панику.
translations.pt: Esse barulho alto deixa qualquer um apavorado.
translations.tr: Bu yüksek ses onu fena halde ürkütüyor.
translations.vi: Tiếng ồn lớn đó làm người ta hoảng sợ.
translations.nl: Dat harde geluid maakt iemand helemaal van streek.
translations.uk: Той гучний шум доводить до паніки.
translations.hu: Az a hangos zaj teljesen kiborítja.
translations.hi: वह तेज शोर उसे घबरा देता है।
translations.pl: Ten głośny hałas wytrąca go z równowagi.
translations.el: Αυτός ο δυνατός θόρυβος τον πανικοβάλλει.
translations.nb: Den høye lyden gjør en helt fra seg.
translations.sv: Det där höga ljudet gör en panikslagen.
translations.ro: Zgomotul acela puternic îl sperie rău.
translations.da: Den høje lyd gør en helt panisk.
translations.fi: Se kova melu saa ihmisen pois tolaltaan.
translations.ja: その大きな騒音は人を怯えさせる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) selecting the noun 'bruit' to form the subject NP.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the subject NP 'Ce bruit fort'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'bruit'; agrees in gender/number (masculine singular).
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; clitic 'l'' (le/la) is a 3rd person singular direct object pronoun attached before the verb.

sentences.target: Tu veux affoler tout le monde.

translations.fr: Tu veux affoler tout le monde.
translations.en: You want to make everyone panic.
translations.es: Quieres que todos entren en pánico.
translations.de: Du willst alle in Panik versetzen.
translations.ko: 너는 모두를 공황 상태에 빠뜨리려고 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你想让所有人陷入恐慌。
translations.pt: Você quer deixar todo mundo em pânico.
translations.he: אתה רוצה להכניס את כולם לפאניקה.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn làm mọi người hoảng loạn.
translations.nl: Je wilt iedereen in paniek brengen.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш ввести всіх у паніку.
translations.hi: तुम सबको घबराहट में डालना चाहते हो।
translations.el: Θέλεις να βάλεις όλους σε πανικό.
translations.nb: Du vil få alle til å få panikk.
translations.id: Kamu ingin membuat semua orang panik.
translations.sv: Du vill få alla i panik.
translations.ro: Vrei să-i bagi pe toți în panică.
translations.da: Du vil få alle til at gå i panik.
translations.ja: あなたはみんなをパニックにさせたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'affoler' as its complement.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'veux'; transitive, taking a direct object.
Quantifier determiner preceding 'le monde'; in the fixed expression 'tout le monde' meaning 'everyone'.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing 'monde'.
Common noun; with 'tout le monde' forms an idiomatic NP meaning 'everyone' as the object of 'affoler'.

translations.en: I’m freaking you out for nothing.
translations.de: Ich mache dir ohne Grund Angst.
translations.ko: 나는 괜히 너를 불안하게 하고 있어.
translations.vi: Tôi đang làm bạn hoảng sợ vô cớ.
translations.nl: Ik maak je voor niets ongerust.
translations.nb: Jeg skremmer deg helt uten grunn.
translations.sv: Jag skrämmer upp dig i onödan.
translations.ja: 私は理由もなくあなたを不安にさせている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Finite verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; clitic 't'' (te) is a 2nd person singular direct object pronoun attached before the verb.
Preposition introducing the PP 'pour rien' expressing purpose/occasion ('for nothing').
Indefinite/negative pronoun functioning as the complement of 'pour' in the idiomatic phrase 'pour rien'.

translations.en: These deadlines freak me out too.
translations.es: Estos plazos también me ponen de los nervios.
translations.de: Diese Fristen machen mir auch Angst.
translations.it: Queste scadenze mandano nel panico anche me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些截止日期也让我很紧张。
translations.yue: 呢啲死線都令我好緊張。
translations.pt: Esses prazos também me deixam em pânico.
translations.tr: Bu son teslim tarihleri beni de korkутuyor.
translations.vi: Những hạn chót này cũng khiến tôi hoảng.
translations.nl: Die deadlines maken mij ook nerveus.
translations.hu: Ezek a határidők engem is kikészítenek.
translations.hi: ये डेडलाइन भी मुझे घबरा देती हैं।
translations.el: Αυτές οι προθεσμίες με πανικοβάλουν κι εμένα.
translations.id: Tenggat waktu ini juga membuatku panik.
translations.sv: De där tidsfristerna gör mig också stressad.
translations.ro: Aceste termene mă sperie și pe mine.
translations.da: De her deadlines gør mig også nervøs.
translations.ja: これらの締め切りは私も不安にさせる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (plural) introducing the subject noun 'délais'.
Common noun (masculine plural); head of the subject NP.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; clitic 'm'' (me) is a 1st person singular direct object pronoun attached before the verb.
Adverb modifying the clause, adding the meaning 'also/too'.
